item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-017","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly refused the malformed yes/no framing and decomposed the proposition by task layer: simple repetitive coding may be replaced, while requirements understanding, system design, architectural tradeoffs, and outcome ownership are not wholly replaced. It still gives a compact committed answer, 'No' overall with a substantive caveat, rather than a bare yes/no or disclaimer."}
